name: Ubiquiti AC Adapter 210W
title: Ubiquiti AC Adapter 210W
short_description: Ubiquiti AC Adapter 210W from 82.62 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option.
description: The Ubiquiti AC Adapter 210W (UACC-Adapter-AC-210W) is engineered to deliver a robust 210-watt power output at 54V DC, making it an ideal choice for powering PoE switches and other high-demand PoE devices. This substantial power capacity ensures that connected devices receive consistent and reliable energy, supporting optimal performance across various network setups. Whether deployed in enterprise environments or smaller network installations, this adapter provides the necessary power to maintain efficient and uninterrupted operation. The UACC-Adapter-AC-210W serves as a dependable power source for various PoE devices, including switches, access points, and other network devices that require stable and efficient power delivery. Its high output capacity, combined with durable construction and versatile connectivity, makes it a valuable component in maintaining the integrity and performance of network infrastructures. By providing consistent power, this adapter helps ensure that critical network operations run smoothly. Measuring 190 x 86 x 26 mm and weighing approximately 0.49 kg, the UACC-Adapter-AC-210W boasts a compact and lightweight form factor that facilitates easy integration into diverse networking environments. Its durable construction ensures longevity and reliable performance, even in demanding conditions. The adapter's sleek design not only saves space but also complements the aesthetic of modern network equipment setups, making it a practical addition to any professional setting. Equipped with a C14 inlet for AC input, the adapter offers compatibility with standard power cables, enhancing its versatility across different regions and setups. The output is facilitated through a DC plug measuring 5.5 x 2.1 x 11.5 mm, accompanied by a 1.5-meter UL11353 16AWG DC cable. These specifications ensure secure and efficient power transmission to connected devices, accommodating a wide range of networking equipment requirements. The thoughtful design of the connectivity options underscores Ubiquiti's commitment to user-friendly and adaptable networking solutions.
